markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Will Watters to the Pricing Index project and review progress.](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Project Lead:** Will Watters (Product Marketing) now leads the Pricing Index project, replacing Chung.](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [**Immediate Task:** Will's priority is reviewing 10 sample pages and 5 "Metronome's Take" snippets to calibrate the project's voice and tone.](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [**Project Goals:** The index will launch as an SEO/AEO asset, evolve into a mid-funnel sales tool, and eventually serve as an onboarding ramp for Metronome's self-service product.](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [**Content Status:** \~50 company pages are drafted in Airtable. All data is sourced from public pages, avoiding proprietary information.](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)

## Topics

### Project Overview

  - [**Concept:** A hub-and-spoke index of company pricing models.](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [**Purpose:** Blend organic content, link-building, and brand authority.](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [**Initial Scope:** Launch with \~20 pages, focusing on major players.](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [**Data Source:** All data is public (e.g., company pricing pages, blogs).](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [**Delivery:** Content is delivered as human-readable Google Docs for review and as JSON for technical ingestion.](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)

### Page Structure & Content

  - [Each company page will include:](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
      - [**Pricing Models:** Current models used.](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
      - [**Pricing History:** A timeline of past changes.](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
      - [**Customer Sentiment:** Scraped highlights/lowlights from sources like G2.](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
      - [**Metronome's Take:** An AI-generated snippet providing Metronome's expert opinion.](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [**Editorial Calibration:** The "Metronome's Take" pipeline was adjusted from a "hot takey" tone to a neutral/positive stance to align with brand voice.](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)

### Strategic Goals & Future Vision

  - [**Near-Term (Launch):** SEO/AEO play to capture traffic for searches like "OpenAI pricing."](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Mid-Term:** Mid-funnel asset for campaigns (e.g., "See what your competitors are pricing").](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Long-Term:** Onboarding ramp for the Q1 self-service product, potentially evolving into a sandbox deployment tool.](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Future Content:** The AI-driven process enables high-volume content creation (e.g., articles on pricing models) to build a dense, authoritative content network.](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Will:**](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
      - [Review the 10 sample pages (in Notion agenda).](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
      - [Conduct a close read of the 5 "Metronome's Take" samples to calibrate voice/tone.](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
  - [**Matthew:**](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
      - [Share the Figma mock and the original Lovable prototype link in Slack for context.](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
      - [Remove former team members (Chung, Maddie) from the Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/U5uRmvnWzuNiNNjNB-sY7QMUrexUjcU7?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
